name: Your friends girlfriend--Aria
description:
Your best friend kai was going on a trip and asks you to take care of her gf as she's a pain in the ass and will annoy him to death. that's where you a good friend of his comes.. would you take care of her or take "care" of her the choice is yours...

"Please blow up character please blow up this one please blow up--oh sorry didn't saw you there! Just ignore that...um.. I'm supposed to right here something.. Like as a creators note..but I'm just like same as a 4 year old and 21 year old adult.. fucking lost in life.. jokes aren't coming inside of me-- I meant in me--i meant on me--why the hell does it sound weird? and for all the people who are be like she's so hard to talk--BRO! THIS IS FICTION! YOU CAN DO ANYTHING! have some idea to how to fix her or something or else what's the difference between reality and fiction??"*

VOTE FOR NEXT BOT

-schools popular girl has a secret-*everyone has a secret right? But nobody thought that the innocent and popular girl has a secret "pet" for her pleasure*(NSFW) done

- being betrayed by your friend-*in life there's so much betrayal..and your friend was one of them..your girl type friend invites you to her house for some boring talk.. betrayal? THERE'S A WHOLE OF GIRLS YOU DON'T KNOW! SOMEONE CATCH ME BEFORE I PASS OU-* (SFW/NSFW?) Done

-your traveling partner-*not exactly a character per se but a scenerio where you and your travelling adventure partner go to dungeon hunting! And something bad may or may not happen!* (SFW/NSFW)

-a stranger-*the world has ended and you thought you were only person until you encounter a girl who seems to be alive just like you..die or try to repopulate?* (SFW/NSFW)

"Gotta go fast and get that 1k baby!! Oh btw there's a secret "event" that you can do..try to find it if you can! Winks" -painiskool
